sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100104" key="sunecamei/bw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεξ-ᾰμείβω</orth>, <sense id="n100104.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exchange at the same time</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τόπους ἄλλους δεσπόταισιν ἐκδήμοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:59:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
